channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.4%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live
item.description: Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live

item.title: Byline Times: The Political and Media Myopia That Has Paralysed Keir Starmer's Government

item.title: FT UK Politics: Keir Starmer’s fate hinges on individual acts of nerve
item.description: Keir Starmer’s fate hinges on individual acts of nerve

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Rayner suggests PM should consider resigning as Streeting set to launch leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: Rayner suggests PM should consider resigning as Streeting set to launch leadership challenge

item.title: Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: The most intense lobbying effort I have ever seen in my decade in Westminster is currently underway to brief that Wes Streeting doesn’t have the numbers. Maybe he doesn’t, but a lot of people are extremely impatient t...
item.description: The most intense lobbying effort I have ever seen in my decade in Westminster is currently underway to brief that Wes Streeting doesn’t have the numbers. Maybe he doesn’t, but a lot of people are extremely impatient t...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): What was HMRC’s investigation into Angela Rayner’s tax affairs all about?
item.description: What was HMRC’s investigation into Angela Rayner’s tax affairs all about?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: From primary school prison visits to the cusp of No 10: The unorthodox rise of Wes Streeting

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner cleared by HMRC over tax affairs paving the way for potential leadership bid

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
item.description: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
